message:
fix(ci): add cleanup step before Homebrew action post-cleanup

The Homebrew actions setup-homebrew post-cleanup fails when trying to
remove the tapped directory we created. Add explicit untap step to
prevent this error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,12 @@ jobs:
 
           exit $failed
 
+      - name: Cleanup tap
+        if: always()
+        run: |
+          # Untap before Homebrew action cleanup to avoid directory removal error
+          brew untap dicklesworthstone/tap 2>/dev/null || true
+
   install-test-macos-intel:
     name: Install Test (macOS Intel)
     runs-on: macos-13
